title: Leucheria chillanensis
taxonomy: Leucheria chillanensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to South America, specifically in Chile and Argentina. The plant belongs to the genus Leucheria and the order Brassicales. Leucheria chillanensis is a member of the Brassicaceae family, which also includes mustard, cabbage, and broccoli. The classification of Leucheria chillanensis is as follows: kingdom: Plantae, clade: angiosperms, clade: eudicots, clade: rosids, order: Brassicales, family: Brassicaceae, genus: Leucheria, species: L. chillanensis.
uses: Leucheria chillanensis is a plant native to Chile and its medicinal uses have been studied.
